calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Defendant Xing San Mo appeared in pro per and there being no appearance by Plaintiff, Xu Dong Zhao, the matter is ordered off calendar and the trial date is vacated.
